SEARCH
Package de.jvstvshd.necrify.common.plugin

Class MuteData

java.lang.Object
de.jvstvshd.necrify.common.plugin.MuteData
public class MuteData extends Object
Represents a data object that is used to transfer mute data between sub-servers. This is used to synchronize mute data between sub-servers and this proxy. Since Minecraft 1.19.1, chat messages cannot be cancelled on the proxy, so this must be done on the sub-servers.

Mute information status updates are sent to the sub-servers using their plugin messaging channels.

Deprecation notice: The fields ADD, REMOVE and UPDATE are deprecated in favor of usage of RECALCULATION and RESET. The former ones are only used for compatibility reasons.

      • Constant Field Values

    • PROTOCOL_VERSION

      public static final int PROTOCOL_VERSION
      The protocol version of the mute data. This is used to ensure that the data is correctly interpreted by the sub-servers. Unexpected results may occur if the version of incoming data does not match.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • RESET

      public static final int RESET
      Starting from 1.2.0-rc.1, this and RECALCULATION are the only type that is actively used. All other ones exist merely for compatibility reasons.

      Used to indicate that all mute data for a user should be reset. This requires only the field getUuid() to be set.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • RECALCULATION

      public static final int RECALCULATION
      Starting from 1.2.0-rc.1, this and RESET are the only type that is actively used. All other ones exist merely for compatibility reasons.

      Used to let sub-servers know that the mute status of a user has changed. This requires all fields of MuteData(int, UUID, String, LocalDateTime, UUID, int) to be set, though getPunishmentId() may be omitted.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • UNKNOWN

      public static final int UNKNOWN
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values
